creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
>  ===>  Configuring for vorbis-tools-1.0b4_1,1
>  autoconf: Undefined macros:
>  configure.in:70:AC_FUNC_SMMAP
>  *** Error code 1

Hi, Anarcat.  Christian sent me some changes for the port which haven't
yet been committed.  They're (essentially) embodied in
http://people.freebsd.org/~trevor/ports/vorbis-tools.diff .  I receive the
same error without them, but with them the port compiles for me.  Would
you mind testing this patch?
-- 
Trevor Johnson
http://jpj.net/~trevor/gpgkey.txt
